name: artisana-root
description: Root package.json to manage the Artisana ecosystem

scripts.build: npm install --prefix ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && (cd ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && npm run build) && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const src='ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend/.next'; const dest='.next'; try { if(fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.rmSync(dest, {recursive:true, force:true}); if(fs.existsSync(src)) { fs.cpSync(src, dest, {recursive:true}); console.log('Successfully synced .next to root'); } else { throw new Error('Source .next not found at ' + src); } } catch(e) { console.error(e.message); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && cd ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
